name: The Echoes of Mars
short_description: The Echoes of Mars is a voxel-style tower defence game. Defend your research base on Mars from ancient creatures by strategically placing towers and using advanced tech.
detailed_description:
In 2137, a crisis erupts at a European Space Authority Mars base near Korolev Crater: ancient creatures awaken from the ice. Your mission: defend the base, unravel Martian secrets, and prepare for an epic battle!


DEFEND YOUR BASE

Experience thrilling tower defence gameplay on Mars. Strategically place and upgrade towers to protect your base from relentless Martian creatures.

STUNNING VOXEL ART

Immerse yourself in beautifully crafted voxel art. Explore the Martian terrain and face off against unique alien enemies.

DYNAMIC STRATEGY

Utilise cutting-edge technology like mines and suborbital strikes. Adapt your strategy in real-time to outsmart and defeat the alien threats.

ENGAGING GAMEPLAY

Experiment with various defence setups and resource management techniques. Choose from different tower types, each with unique abilities to counter diverse Martian enemies.

Created by a passionate solo developer, "The Echoes of Mars" invites you to share feedback and help shape the game. Your survival skills and strategic mind are crucial for humanity's foothold on Mars.
